issues.title: MissionGlyph primitive library
issues.deliverable: Replace character placeholders with reusable inline glyph primitives for genesis, taste, build, ops, cortex, arc, proof, and gate.
acceptance: Every glyph variant has a distinct silhouette.
Glyphs are ornamental and text labels remain primary.
Active, warning, locked, and idle treatments are supported.

issues.title: Arc-to-organ visual adapter
issues.deliverable: Add a presentation adapter that maps branch arc and mission stage data through shared Cambium visual stages before rendering.
acceptance: Branch chips no longer choose glyphs by array index.
Questline stages inherit organ identity consistently.
Unknown arcs fail to a neutral idle organ state.

issues.title: Branch rail chip state system
issues.deliverable: Rebuild branch chips so selected, active, stale, blocked, and locked branches match the state-stack reference.
acceptance: Fitcheck selected active, Vantyx stale, Snow Gloves blocked, and IVerif locked states are visually distinct.
Each chip remains thumb-friendly and text-readable.
State token and glyph never rely on color alone.

issues.title: Selected branch halo interaction
issues.deliverable: Implement the selected halo behavior for branch chips using one clear orbit or underline treatment.
acceptance: Only one branch chip shows selected state.
Selected state is visible without motion.
Tap target and active feedback remain stable on mobile.

issues.title: Mission hero map texture
issues.deliverable: Upgrade the MissionCard background into a compact branch map with contour texture, active node, rail paths, and packet dots.
acceptance: Mission hero visually echoes the reference map texture.
Map texture never covers the mission title or metadata.
Active node maps to the selected branch/mission context.

issues.title: Mission metadata grid polish
issues.deliverable: Rework Owner, Gate, Dispatch, and Promotion metadata into compact founder-readable cells.
acceptance: Metadata cells fit on mobile without overflow.
Promotion state is cautious when proof is missing.
Raw source/schema copy is absent from MissionCard.

issues.title: Questline stage composer
issues.deliverable: Render a four-to-six stage questline that prioritizes founder-readable stages like Seed, Packet, Proof, and Launch.
acceptance: Stages are readable without long truncation.
Status tokens show complete, active, blocked, and locked.
Overflowing raw task lists do not dominate the questline.

issues.title: Questline rail states
issues.deliverable: Add rail segments between questline nodes with active packets, blocked warning endpoint, and locked low-opacity continuation.
acceptance: Active rail shows packet drift or static dots in reduced motion.
Blocked rail ends in a peach warning marker.
Locked continuation is visibly muted.

issues.title: Selected row in State Stack
issues.deliverable: Implement the State Stack selected row with orbit halo, current focus copy, and selected token.
acceptance: Selected row matches the mobile reference hierarchy.
Current focus is branch/mission-readable.
Row can open the selected branch sheet.

issues.title: Blocked row in State Stack
issues.deliverable: Implement the blocked row with peach warning glyph, blocker reason, and action affordance.
acceptance: Blocked row never looks complete.
Reason explains the actual gate or proof blocker.
Row opens Gate or proof detail as appropriate.

issues.title: Proof-needed row in State Stack
issues.deliverable: Implement the proof-needed row with dotted receipt ring and evidence-missing copy.
acceptance: Proof-needed row uses dotted proof orbit.
Copy names the founder-understandable proof item.
Row opens proof details without raw architecture copy.

issues.title: Locked row in State Stack
issues.deliverable: Implement the locked row with muted lock token and next-stage explanation.
acceptance: Locked row uses low-opacity mint treatment.
Text explains what unlocks next.
Locked state has no success glow.

issues.title: ProofList content rewrite
issues.deliverable: Rewrite Mission proof rows around proof outcomes rather than source paths or technical identifiers.
acceptance: Proof row labels are founder-readable.
Route/source/schema values move to Inspect or detail sheet.
Rows preserve access to proof detail.

issues.title: Proof row affordance and sheets
issues.deliverable: Add clear chevrons, tap affordances, and proof-detail sheet routing for each proof row.
acceptance: Every proof row can open a detail sheet.
Sheet header uses proof glyph and state token.
Back navigation returns to the Mission flow.

issues.title: KPI orbit pulse rows
issues.deliverable: Replace two-letter KPI circles with orbit progress rings for survival and better-than-survival signals.
acceptance: KPI rows show orbit ring and label.
Pending or blocked KPI states are not colored as success.
KPI copy stays compact and readable.

issues.title: KPI packet bars
issues.deliverable: Add small packet bars to KPI rows to show signal depth without implying fake progress.
acceptance: Bars are visually subtle and non-overlapping.
Bars are tied to served KPI state where available.
Reduced motion displays static bars.

issues.title: GateActionRow polish
issues.deliverable: Finalize non-floating Review Gate and Open Proof buttons with native mini app spacing and state-aware treatment.
acceptance: Buttons remain in document flow.
Buttons do not cover KPIs or proof rows.
Disabled states remain visible and explanatory.

issues.title: Mission empty and stale states
issues.deliverable: Design Mission empty/stale states for missing branch packets or stale envelope without reverting to generic copy.
acceptance: Missing branch packets state names the packet gap.
Stale state prompts refresh before decisions.
Inspect link exposes technical details.

issues.title: Branch mission sheet header polish
issues.deliverable: Upgrade branch mission sheets with glyph header, claim guard, questline, proof, KPI, and inspect sections.
acceptance: Sheet header reflects focus: selected, gate, or proof.
Claim guard remains prominent for blocked proof.
Sheet layout matches component-system language.

issues.title: Mission reduced motion and accessibility pass
issues.deliverable: Ensure Mission component states remain legible with reduced motion and text-first accessibility.
acceptance: Motion primitives freeze into visible state.
Labels remain available for every glyph-only element.
Focus and tap states do not resize layout.

issues.title: Gate chamber shell
issues.deliverable: Rebuild the Gate page shell as a decision chamber with Gate aperture, state strip, and branch-aware context.
acceptance: Gate page no longer reads as a generic signed queue.
The first viewport explains founder decision state.
Gate glyph and state token are visible.

issues.title: Gate empty state experience
issues.deliverable: Replace the current empty state with an honest no-decision chamber that still shows branch readiness context.
acceptance: No waiting decisions is clear without celebratory overclaim.
Empty state offers Mission and Inspect routes.
Empty state uses locked/idle visual language.

issues.title: Gate decision hero card
issues.deliverable: Add a hero card for the selected/open decision with branch, mission, proof, and consequence summary.
acceptance: Hero answers what decision is waiting.
Branch and mission are visible before technical details.
Card uses warning/active state honestly.

issues.title: Gate queue card layout
issues.deliverable: Rebuild queue rows as compact branch decision cards with glyph, status token, and consequence preview.
acceptance: Each row has branch/mission context.
Rows are thumb-friendly and dense.
Rows avoid route/idempotency copy.

issues.title: Proof attached row
issues.deliverable: Add a proof-attached row pattern for each decision, showing what evidence is available or missing.
acceptance: Proof row uses proof glyph or dotted receipt ring.
Missing proof stays warning/pending.
Proof row opens proof detail.

issues.title: Approve consequence display
issues.deliverable: Show approve consequence in founder language before any action is queued.
acceptance: Approve effect is visible on primary card or preflight.
Consequence copy avoids endpoint jargon.
Risk/irreversibility is not hidden.

issues.title: Reroll consequence display
issues.deliverable: Show reroll consequence with same prominence as approve consequence.
acceptance: Reroll effect is visible before action.
Reroll copy names what changes next.
Reroll does not appear as a failure state by default.

issues.title: Reversibility summary
issues.deliverable: Add a concise reversibility/idempotency summary to Gate cards and preflight sheets.
acceptance: Primary copy states whether action can be reversed.
Technical idempotency key remains in audit detail.
Unsafe or unknown reversibility uses warning state.

issues.title: Gate aperture glyph
issues.deliverable: Implement the Gate warning aperture glyph as its own reusable visual primitive.
acceptance: Gate glyph differs from generic build triangle.
Warning version uses peach stroke without glow bloom.
Locked version desaturates to soft mint.

issues.title: Gate warningAttention primitive
issues.deliverable: Apply the warningAttention motion primitive to blocked Gate rows once, then rest.
acceptance: No flashing loop.
Reduced motion shows static warning state.
Attention does not compete with selected branch halo.

issues.title: Decision state stack
issues.deliverable: Add Gate state stack rows for Decision, Proof, Effect, and Reversible.
acceptance: Rows map to real open item data.
Each row has glyph/token treatment.
Rows can open related detail sheets.

issues.title: Signed preflight sheet layout
issues.deliverable: Redesign approve/reroll preflight sheets to lead with decision, proof, consequence, and reversibility.
acceptance: Preflight is founder-readable first.
Telegram auth details move to audit rows.
Approve and reroll buttons stay distinct.

issues.title: Signed result sheet layout
issues.deliverable: Redesign result sheets after approve/reroll so outcome, queued effect, and next step are clear.
acceptance: Success does not imply branch proof completion.
Failure state names exact reason.
Next step links to Mission or Inspect.

issues.title: Telegram unavailable state
issues.deliverable: Add a clear state for trying to approve outside founder Telegram context.
acceptance: Primary copy says open in Telegram to approve.
No action button appears enabled when auth is missing.
Inspect detail can show auth route info.

issues.title: Gate branch filter chips
issues.deliverable: Add optional branch filter chips when multiple branch decisions exist.
acceptance: Filter chips use BranchArcChip language.
Selected filter has one halo.
Filtering does not hide urgent blockers silently.

issues.title: Gate row expansion details
issues.deliverable: Add expandable details for proof, consequence, actor, updated time, and audit trail.
acceptance: Expansion is accessible from each row.
Details are visually secondary.
Architecture terms stay in expanded/audit area.

issues.title: Gate action safety copy
issues.deliverable: Rewrite Gate action copy so it names decision safety rather than queue mechanics.
acceptance: Primary buttons avoid signed queue jargon.
Dangerous or irreversible actions use warning tone.
Copy stays short enough for mobile buttons.

issues.title: Gate-to-Mission return path
issues.deliverable: Add a clear path from Gate decisions back to the affected Mission branch/card.
acceptance: Decision card links to relevant Mission context.
Back path preserves selected branch where possible.
No forced scene jump on accidental taps.

issues.title: Gate stale and sync states
issues.deliverable: Show stale Gate data and refresh status without hiding queued decisions.
acceptance: Stale chip appears when derived data is old.
Refresh does not erase visible decisions prematurely.
Inspect link exposes timestamp/source details.

issues.title: Gate reduced motion and safe spacing
issues.deliverable: Ensure Gate animations, rows, and action sheets remain stable under reduced motion and mobile safe areas.
acceptance: No layout shift on warning attention.
Buttons fit inside viewport and safe area.
State is visible without animation.

issues.title: Tools page shell
issues.deliverable: Rebuild Tools as a mission-aware toolbelt page with header, freshness, and branch context.
acceptance: Visible page says Tools, not Commands.
Current branch/mission context appears near top.
Shell follows component-system spacing.

issues.title: Tool group segmented control
issues.deliverable: Add Act, Ask, Report, and Coordinate group controls for scanning tools by job.
acceptance: Groups are visible and thumb-friendly.
Selected group uses one state highlight.
No group causes layout jump.

issues.title: Mission recommendation panel
issues.deliverable: Add a suggested-tool panel based on current branch mission, blocker, or proof requirement.
acceptance: Suggested tool explains why it matters now.
Panel can link to command detail.
Missing recommendation has honest empty state.

issues.title: Tool card glyph taxonomy
issues.deliverable: Assign glyphs to tool actions using act, ask, report, coordinate, proof, and gate visual language.
acceptance: Each card has a meaningful glyph.
Glyphs are not generic SaaS icons.
Text label remains primary.

issues.title: Tool availability states
issues.deliverable: Render ready, locked, stale, blocked, and unavailable tools with state tokens.
acceptance: Unavailable tools cannot look ready.
Disabled reason is visible.
State uses icon/label, not color alone.

issues.title: Command syntax drawer
issues.deliverable: Move exact slash command syntax into an expandable drawer or sheet below the mission-facing explanation.
acceptance: Primary card says what the tool does.
Syntax remains copyable.
Source/debug copy stays secondary.

issues.title: Copy command feedback
issues.deliverable: Improve copy interaction with copied state, haptic feedback, and fallback copy text.
acceptance: Copied state appears after tap.
Error state explains clipboard failure.
Feedback does not resize the row.

issues.title: Act group tool cards
issues.deliverable: Design Act group cards for commands that move current mission work forward.
acceptance: Act group prioritizes current blocker actions.
Cards show consequence or next step.
Dangerous actions are warning-gated.

issues.title: Ask group tool cards
issues.deliverable: Design Ask group cards for status, freshness, and branch questions.
acceptance: Ask group answers what can be queried.
Cards route to status/detail sheets.
Query tools are not presented as action tools.

issues.title: Report group tool cards
issues.deliverable: Design Report group cards for proof capture, evidence foldback, and branch receipts.
acceptance: Report group ties tools to proof-needed rows.
Cards show expected output receipt.
Report actions link to Open Proof where relevant.

issues.title: Coordinate group tool cards
issues.deliverable: Design Coordinate group cards for Hermes, Plexus, Fabric, and handoff routines.
acceptance: Coordinate group names target system in plain language.
Internal routing names stay secondary.
Cards show current availability.

issues.title: Tool context chips
issues.deliverable: Add branch, gate, proof, and dispatch context chips to relevant tool cards.
acceptance: Context chips use StateToken style.
Chips stay compact on mobile.
Chips do not duplicate card title.

issues.title: Tool safety sheet
issues.deliverable: Add a safety/detail sheet for tools with consequence, required proof, and expected result.
acceptance: Sheet explains action before syntax.
Risk state is clear.
Audit/source details are secondary.

issues.title: Disabled tool reason rows
issues.deliverable: Add clear disabled reasons for unavailable tools, including missing proof, auth, or stale data.
acceptance: Disabled card is not tappable as if ready.
Reason is visible without opening Inspect.
Inspect link provides technical details.

issues.title: Mission deep links to Tools
issues.deliverable: Allow Mission proof/blocker rows to deep-link to the most relevant tool card.
acceptance: Deep link selects Tools and relevant group/card.
Selected card gets a temporary focus treatment.
Back path returns to Mission context.

issues.title: Tool payload preview
issues.deliverable: Show a compact preview of what a command will send or request, without exposing secrets.
acceptance: Preview is redaction-safe.
Payload preview is visually secondary.
No auth/token data appears.

issues.title: Tool audit links
issues.deliverable: Add Inspect links for command source, bridge route, and tool proof details.
acceptance: Audit link appears in detail sheet.
Primary Tools page stays founder-facing.
Inspect target opens the right detail section.

issues.title: Tools empty and error states
issues.deliverable: Design empty/error states for missing command data or unavailable tool source.
acceptance: Empty state offers refresh and Inspect.
Error state does not imply broken branch mission.
Copy names the missing surface plainly.

issues.title: Tools recent/suggested strip
issues.deliverable: Add a small recent or suggested tools strip derived from current mission needs, not persisted user tracking.
acceptance: Strip is derived from current envelope only.
Items remain relevant to Mission state.
No new backend persistence is required.

issues.title: Tools mobile density polish
issues.deliverable: Tune card density, scroll rhythm, and safe-area spacing for repeat tool use.
acceptance: Cards scan well on mobile.
Long command text does not overflow.
Tap targets remain at least 48px.

issues.title: Story page shell
issues.deliverable: Rebuild Story as a branch progress feed with clear page header, branch context, and state-aware grouping.
acceptance: Visible page says Story.
Current branch context is visible.
Primary copy avoids ledger fallback language.

issues.title: Story group controls
issues.deliverable: Add Mission wins, New signals, Lessons, and Drift group controls.
acceptance: Groups are visible and scannable.
Selected group uses component state treatment.
All groups have useful empty states.

issues.title: Mission wins cards
issues.deliverable: Design Mission wins cards for completed branch mission evidence and meaningful progress.
acceptance: Cards show mission, outcome, and proof cue.
Wins do not imply unrelated live readiness.
Cards link to proof or Mission detail.

issues.title: New signals cards
issues.deliverable: Design New signals cards for fresh branch-relevant inputs from Hermes, Paperclip, Fabric, or packets.
acceptance: Signal source is summarized in plain language.
Technical source moves to detail sheet.
Freshness state is visible.

issues.title: Lessons cards
issues.deliverable: Design Lessons cards for durable learning or packet changes that affect branch execution.
acceptance: Lesson card states what changed.
Lesson links to branch packet or proof detail.
Copy stays product-facing.

issues.title: Drift cards
issues.deliverable: Design Drift cards for stale, missing, contradictory, or blocked signals.
acceptance: Drift uses warning/stale treatment.
Drift never renders as a win.
Card names needed follow-up.

issues.title: Beat glyph taxonomy
issues.deliverable: Assign glyphs and state tokens for win, signal, lesson, drift, proof, and gate beats.
acceptance: Every beat has a meaningful glyph.
Text remains primary.
Reduced motion stays legible.

issues.title: Story timeline rail
issues.deliverable: Add a subtle timeline/rail treatment connecting beats without creating a decorative card stack.
acceptance: Rail does not cover text.
Packet dots imply movement only where helpful.
Reduced motion freezes packet dots.

issues.title: Branch filter chips
issues.deliverable: Add branch filter chips so Story can focus on Fitcheck, Vantyx, Snow Gloves, or IVerif.
acceptance: Filter chips use BranchArcChip/state grammar.
Selected branch has one halo.
All branch mode is available.

issues.title: Latest change hero
issues.deliverable: Add a compact latest-change hero summarizing the newest meaningful branch update.
acceptance: Hero is concise and founder-facing.
Hero links to full beat detail.
Stale latest data shows stale state.

issues.title: Beat detail sheet
issues.deliverable: Design beat detail sheets with summary, proof, source, related mission, and next action.
acceptance: Sheet keeps source/proof detail available.
Primary feed stays clean.
Sheet can link to Mission/Gate/Inspect.

issues.title: Evidence linkouts
issues.deliverable: Add proof/evidence linkouts from Story beats to relevant ProofList or Inspect sections.
acceptance: Evidence link label is clear.
Missing evidence uses proof-needed state.
Links do not leak raw schema copy in feed.

issues.title: Contradiction warning treatment
issues.deliverable: Add specific visual and copy treatment for contradictory or stale story data.
acceptance: Contradictions are not hidden in generic drift.
Warning copy names the conflict plainly.
Inspect link exposes detailed source rows.

issues.title: Story empty state
issues.deliverable: Design an empty Story state for no branch beats served yet.
acceptance: Empty state explains what will appear.
Refresh and Inspect actions are available.
No fake progress language.

issues.title: Story digest cards
issues.deliverable: Add digest cards that summarize a set of related beats into one compact scan surface.
acceptance: Digest card shows count and theme.
Expanded sheet lists individual beats.
Digest does not hide blockers.

issues.title: Packet trail visuals
issues.deliverable: Add small packet trail visuals between related beats where they represent actual sequence.
acceptance: Packet trail is subtle.
Trail is not used on every row.
Reduced motion uses static dots.

issues.title: Source containment links
issues.deliverable: Move source, schema, and operator narrative details into detail sheets or Inspect.
acceptance: Primary cards pass copy containment.
Detail sheets preserve auditability.
Inspect link targets the right detail.

issues.title: Story action links
issues.deliverable: Add action links from beats to Mission, Gate, Tools, or Inspect depending on beat type.
acceptance: Links are type-aware.
Links preserve branch context.
No accidental destructive action from Story.

issues.title: Story freshness state
issues.deliverable: Add freshness and sync state to Story so old beats are not mistaken for current state.
acceptance: Freshness chip appears in page context.
Stale beats are visually marked.
Refresh does not erase visible context abruptly.

issues.title: Story mobile readability polish
issues.deliverable: Tune typography, spacing, truncation, and row rhythm for long narrative text.
acceptance: Long titles wrap cleanly.
No card text overlaps controls.
Feed remains comfortable on narrow viewports.

issues.title: Inspect page shell
issues.deliverable: Rebuild Inspect as a deliberate proof/debug page with clear title, scope, and grouped sections.
acceptance: Visible page says Inspect.
Page explains it contains proof/debug detail.
Old Map/Operator Map primary copy is gone.

issues.title: Inspect overview grid
issues.deliverable: Add an overview grid for freshness, policy, live proof, branch packets, gates, tools, rails, and evidence.
acceptance: All groups are visible as entry points.
Each group has state token and count/status.
Blocked groups are not success-colored.

issues.title: Freshness panel
issues.deliverable: Build a freshness panel showing derivedAt, age, source, refresh route, and stale state.
acceptance: Freshness is understandable without code knowledge.
Stale state is visually distinct.
Refresh route stays in Inspect, not primary pages.

issues.title: Branch packets panel
issues.deliverable: Build a branch packet panel for branchStories source, rows, selected branch, missing packet diagnostics, and packet links.
acceptance: Panel shows branch count and missing rows clearly.
Packet source/schema remains inspect-only.
Missing branchStories has a guided diagnosis.

issues.title: Live proof panel
issues.deliverable: Build a live proof panel with readiness summary, blockers, receipts, and honest 8/10 boundary.
acceptance: Telegram initData blocker remains visible.
Device artifact blocker remains visible.
Ready rows do not imply all live proof is complete.

issues.title: Policy panel
issues.deliverable: Build a policy panel for operator policy state, claim guard, proof boundaries, and promotion rules.
acceptance: Policy blockers are easy to scan.
Promotion ladder is clear.
No autonomous overclaim.

issues.title: Gate audit panel
issues.deliverable: Build a Gate audit panel for open items, decision context, signed-action evidence, consequences, and reversibility.
acceptance: Gate audit preserves route/idempotency details.
Primary Gate page can link here.
Sensitive auth values remain redacted.

issues.title: Tools audit panel
issues.deliverable: Build a Tools audit panel for command sources, bridge routes, command availability, and payload proof.
acceptance: Command source details are inspect-only.
Tool availability is summarized.
Payload previews stay redaction-safe.

issues.title: Organ and rail contract panel
issues.deliverable: Preserve Cambium visual stages and rails as an Inspect contract panel.
acceptance: GENESIS/TASTE/BUILD/OPS/CORTEX remain visible.
Rail sheets show from/to/lane/active status.
This panel is not the primary page experience.

issues.title: Evidence list panel
issues.deliverable: Build an evidence panel that aggregates proof paths, receipts, screenshots, and branch evidence rows.
acceptance: Evidence rows are grouped and searchable/scannable.
Missing evidence uses proof-needed state.
Rows link back to related page context.

issues.title: Mini app surface contract panel
issues.deliverable: Add a panel showing Mission, Gate, Tools, Story, Inspect contract coverage and page readiness.
acceptance: Five scenes are listed.
Each scene has state and proof link.
Coverage does not imply live Telegram readiness.

issues.title: Inspect detail sheet template
issues.deliverable: Create a consistent detail sheet template for all Inspect panels.
acceptance: Template has summary, source, proof, related page, and action links.
Long technical values wrap safely.
Sensitive values are redacted.

issues.title: Primary page trace links
issues.deliverable: Implement trace links from Mission/Gate/Tools/Story into the relevant Inspect detail section.
acceptance: Links land on the correct section/sheet.
Trace link labels are clear.
Back path returns to originating page.

issues.title: Stale and missing diagnostics
issues.deliverable: Add dedicated diagnostics for stale envelope, missing branchStories, missing live proof, and unavailable command data.
acceptance: Each diagnostic states symptom and likely next action.
Diagnostics do not hide current UI context.
No false success language.

issues.title: Secret redaction display
issues.deliverable: Add redaction-safe rendering for auth/initData/token-like values in Inspect details.
acceptance: Secret-like strings are never shown raw.
Redacted values still explain what proof is missing.
Secret scan remains clean.

issues.title: Readiness blocker hierarchy
issues.deliverable: Group blockers by founder action, live proof, packet, policy, command, and visual proof.
acceptance: Most important blockers appear first.
Each blocker has owner/next action when known.
Ready rows are visually secondary to blockers.

issues.title: Branch fixture inspector
issues.deliverable: Add a fixture inspector for the branch-stories proof fixture used by viewport captures.
acceptance: Fixture rows are visible in Inspect.
Fixture source is inspect-only.
Fixture does not masquerade as live proof.

issues.title: Visual stage sheets
issues.deliverable: Polish stage sheets for each Cambium organ with glyph, routes, active arc, and related branch rows.
acceptance: Each organ sheet has glyph/state header.
Rows map back to branch/quest data.
Read-only nature is clear.

issues.title: Rail sheet containment
issues.deliverable: Polish rail sheets with from/to, lane, active status, proof source, and related pages.
acceptance: Rail technical copy stays in rail sheet.
Active rail uses component state language.
Rail sheets do not leak into primary page copy.

issues.title: Copy proof summary action
issues.deliverable: Add a safe copy/share proof summary action that summarizes current Inspect state without secrets.
acceptance: Summary excludes tokens and auth data.
Summary names remaining blockers.
Copy feedback is visible and non-disruptive.
